title: Push Doctor - Telemedicine Platform UK
problem: UK patients wait weeks for GP appointments. NHS capacity constraints limit access to primary care.
solution: Telemedicine platform providing video GP consultations, e-prescriptions, and referrals. NHS and private options.
technology: Telemedicine platform, EHR integration, NHS APIs
regulatory_notes: CQC registered, NHS standards, UK medical regulations
varden_fit: HIGH - Telemedicine platform with NHS integration. Infrastructure for primary care access.
notes: boring_software=true, contrarian=false. UK representation. Telemedicine integrated with NHS.
